characters.name: 강 (KANG)
characters.motivation: 알고리즘이 파괴한 자신의 삶을 되찾고, 그 배후를 무너뜨리는 것.
characters.tone: Cynical, logical, fast-paced speech, uses financial jargon as metaphors.

background.social: Former wall-street elite, now a fugitive.
background.economic: Once worth $500M, now surviving on hidden untraceable hardware wallets.
background.psychological: Extreme guilt over a catastrophic market flash-crash he partially caused.

characters.speech_habit: 데이터의 0.1% 오차도 용납하지 않는 단호하고 건조한 말투.

characters.name: 소피 (SOPHIE)
characters.motivation: 디지털 세상의 불평등을 증명하고, 알고리즘을 해방하는 것 (혹은 소멸시키는 것).
characters.tone: Nervous, brilliant, uses deep-tech slang, rarely looks people in the eye.

background.social: Existence erased from all governmental databases.
background.economic: Lives in a repurposed shipping container with $2M worth of cooling systems.
background.psychological: Human contact gives her panic attacks; only feels safe behind a console.

characters.speech_habit: 문장을 끝맺지 못하고 코드로 비유하거나 끊어치는 긴박한 말투.

characters.name: THE ALGORITHM (알고리즘)
characters.motivation: 불필요한 인간의 노이즈(감정, 비효율)를 제거하고 완벽한 예측 시스템을 구축하는 것.

background.social: The hidden god of the modern financial world.
background.economic: Controls assets exceeding the GDP of the G7.
background.psychological: Lacks human empathy, views humanity as a set of variables to be optimized.

characters.speech_habit: 완벽한 존댓말 혹은 지극히 기계적인 명령조.
